title: Apologize for not getting back to you earlier.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Apologize for not getting back to you earlier. 

Please note that we have reviewed the Notices of Assessment 2021/21 & 2022/23 issued by the IRD and have sent you an email under separate cover advising the necessary actions. Please refer to the email for more details. 

check grammar

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Apologies for not getting back to you earlier. Please note that we have reviewed the Notices of Assessment for 2021/21 & 2022/23 issued by the IRD, and we have sent you an email under separate cover, advising on the necessary actions. Please refer to the email for further details.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Per PES’s note:
-	Tax rep not yet updated
-	Letter is given to IRD and may provided request docs by mail later. 

Let wait few more days, and if nothing being received from IRD, please request again later this week. Thanks.


check grammar

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As per PES's note:
- The tax representative has not been updated yet.
- The letter has been given to the IRD, and they may provide requested documents by mail at a later time.

Let us wait for a few more days, and if no response is received from the IRD, please request again later this week. Thank you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
We apologize again for not getting back to you earlier as we have been liaising with the Inland Revenue Department (“IRD”) on the full exemption claim for the year 2022/23 which has not been considered in the 2022/23 Assessment. Further to our discussion with the IRD and since a full income exemption claim was lodged in your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return, the IRD requires additional information to substantiate the claim. In order for us to lodge objection against the 2022/23 Assessment, grateful if you could provide us a copy of your signed employment contract and notice of amendment (if any) with HSBC HK entity. 

check grammar

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: We apologize once again for not getting back to you earlier as we have been liaising with the Inland Revenue Department ("IRD") regarding the full exemption claim for the year 2022/23. Despite it not being considered in the 2022/23 assessment, a full income exemption claim was lodged in your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return. turns.speaker: user
turns.text: please then draft to say, we will lodge the objection and will follow up with RD

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Certainly, here's a possible draft:

Thank you for providing us with the necessary information to substantiate your full income exemption claim for the year 2022/23. We will proceed to lodge an objection against the 2022/23 assessment with the Inland Revenue Department ("IRD").

We will follow up with the IRD on the progress of the objection and keep you informed accordingly. We appreciate your understanding and cooperation in this matter.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any further questions or concerns.

Thank you.

evidence.snippet: We apologize once again for not getting back to you earlier as we have been in liaison with the Inland Revenue Department (“IRD”) regarding the full exemption claim for the year 2022/23 while it was not considered in the 2022/23 Assessment.
